The native may not have any issues. But the Sun-Mars conjunction

CHART495
Here Mercury, Jupiter and Venus are conjunct in Virgo. This made
the native a very wise man full of knowledge. But this combination
brought obstructions in the' efforts for marriage. With Moon'-Mats
conjunction in Gemini there was no harmony even after marriage. As
Venus is debilitated, the native will have access to a low born woman, but
